const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|court listener|citation|docket|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(matches);

const rs = await Promise.all([
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", case_name:"Amy Hadley v. City of South Bend, Indiana", filed_after:"2025-01-01", num_results:1, fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url","docketNumber","opinions","posture","procedural_history"]}),
  tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", case_name:"Pena v. City of Los Angeles", filed_after:"2025-01-01", num_results:1, fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url","docketN

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", case_name:"Pung v. Isabella County", filed_after:"2026-01-01", filed_before:"2026-07-17", num_results:5, fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url","docketNumber","opinions"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) if (c.type === "text") text(c.text);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions", item_id:11346051, fields:["id","type","html_with_citations"]});
for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) if (c.type === "text") text(c.text);
